flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Millsaps College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (695 → 549).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Millsaps College fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (71.3% → 58.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Millsaps College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (60.6% → 54.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Millsaps College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (55.5% vs 64.3%).
